dialogues.text: Hey, I'm trying to get home. Need $4 for the train.
Help me hand these flyers to people passing by? $7 for an hour.
dialogues.yes_response: Just stand here and hand them out. Easy money.
dialogues.no_response: Fair enough. Not everyone's into it.

dialogues.text: Between jobs right now. Could you spare $3?
dialogues.no_response: Yeah it's tough out here. No worries.

dialogues.text: I'm setting up a table for a pop-up sale. Help me set it up? $8.
dialogues.yes_response: Table's over there. Legs fold out.
dialogues.no_response: I'll take longer but I'll manage.

dialogues.text: Trying to cover rent. $10 would actually help a lot right now.
dialogues.yes_response: This means more than you know.
dialogues.no_response: It's alright. I'll call my brother.

dialogues.text: Return this jacket to the store around the corner? Receipt's attached. I'll give you $6.
dialogues.yes_response: They might ask for ID. Just say it was a gift.
dialogues.no_response: Alright I'll do it after work.

dialogues.text: Trying to scrape together $5 for a hot meal.
dialogues.no_response: I'll skip it. Used to it.

dialogues.text: Help me push my car around the block? It stalled and I can't get towed until 6. $9.
dialogues.no_response: Fair. I'll wait for a friend.

dialogues.text: Just $2. I forgot my wallet at work.
Help me load these boxes into that van? $10 for 20 minutes.
dialogues.yes_response: Stack them flat. Not too high.
